name: SFO: Learning PDE Operators via Spectral Filtering

description: arXiv:2601.17090v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Partial differential equations (PDEs) govern complex systems, yet neural operators often struggle to efficiently capture the long-range, nonlocal interactions inherent in their solution maps. We introduce Spectral Filtering Operator (SFO), a neural operator that parameterizes integral kernels using the Universal Spectral Basis (USB), a f...
author: Noam Koren, Rafael Moschopoulos, Kira Radinsky, Elad Hazan
